title: hieracium krasanii subsp. kukulense
intro: Hieracium krasanii subsp. kukulense is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawkweed, a type of flowering plant. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium krasanii subsp. kukulense include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
